name: Marcus T.
text: Great breakdown of the rate comparison tools. I've been sitting on 4.5% for 6 months now and was wondering if I should lock in higher before they drop. This actually convinced me to move some funds today.

name: Sarah K.
text: One thing you didn't mention: the FDIC insurance limits. I have three HYSA accounts across different banks specifically to stay under the $250k cap. Anyone else doing this?

name: David R.
text: The title is a bit fear-mongering about rates dropping, but the comparison matrix at the end is solid. I'll be using it to audit my current setup.

name: Jennifer L.
text: I switched to Marcus last month at 5.02% after reading similar articles. No regrets so far, though the lack of a mobile app is kind of annoying.
